final:
module top_module(
  input wire clk,
  input wire we,
  input wire [12:0] addr,
  input wire [11:0] din,
  output reg [11:0] dout
);reg [11:0] mem [5777:0];
  integer i;

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin mem[addr] <= din ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  dout <= mem[addr] ;
  end

endmodule
